hero_match.title: PSL 2026: Lahore Qalandars vs Hyderabad Kingsmen

ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield Final: Victoria vs South Australia

summary: The PSL 2026 season kicks off today with the opening match between Lahore Qalandars and Hyderabad Kingsmen. The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is also underway but has been affected by rain on the first day.
